name: EdwLoadAlineoMemberRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'ALINEOMEMBER' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND SRC_SYS_CD IN ('ALINEO', 'IHMANALYTICS')) UPDATE t SET t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC t INNER JOIN cte ON t.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND t.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND t.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND t.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW ALINEOMEMBER Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
